item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👎Bob Lindenhovius - NO
item.description: Bob Lindenhovius signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent NO.

item.description: News article "The Week Ahead: January 12-16, 2025 | Washington State House Republicans" from House Republicans.

item.description: James McMahan signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent WA Assoc Sheriffs & Police Chiefs.

item.title: 👍Dru Swaim - Attorney General's Office
item.description: Dru Swaim signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Attorney General's Office.

item.description: Crystal Leatherman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Retail Association. They are a registered lobbyist.
